root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix race of TestSkipWithGrant.

evidence: evidence: test: fix race of TestSkipWithGrant
